data.biography:
Nombre: Parattakorn

Family Name: Kaiyanan

Native name: ซี ปรัตถกร คัยนันทน์

Also Known as: Parattakon Khaiyanan

Nacionalidad: Thai

Género: Male

Nacido: abril 4, 2001

Edad: 22
See Parattakorn Kaiyanan is an actor under One31 since competing on the Channel One31 star search programme "The Next One." He studies digital media and broadcasting at Bangkok University.
data.name: Parattakorn Kaiyanan
ปรัตถกร คัยนันทน์
